nasb.text: Shecaniah the son of Jehiel, one of the sons of Elam, said to Ezra, “We have been unfaithful to our God and have married foreign women from the peoples of the land; yet now there is hope for Israel in spite of this.

esv.text: And Shecaniah the son of Jehiel, of the sons of Elam, addressed Ezra: “We have broken faith with our God and have married foreign women from the peoples of the land, but even now there is hope for Israel in spite of this.

cnv.text: 屬以攔的子孫、耶歇的兒子示迦尼對以斯拉說：“我們對　神不忠，娶了這地這外族女子為妻。雖然這樣，以色列現在還有希望。

ccb.text: 以拦宗族耶歇的儿子示迦尼对以斯拉说：“我们对我们的上帝不忠，娶这地方的外族女子为妻，但以色列还有希望。
